flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Miami rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.8k → $62.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Miami rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.8k → $62.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Miami fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Miami are 58% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($75.3k vs $47.6k).
